overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character exploring a traditional Japanese temple complex during golden hour. The character moves from a covered walkway through an open courtyard with a large red torii gate, then approaches the main temple entrance guarded by two armed sentries in red and green armor.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a view of a glowing blue energy sphere in an open area before entering a covered temple walkway. The character walks through the corridor lined with stone columns, potted plants, and a red carpet runner, moving toward the exit at the far end.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a sunlit temple courtyard dominated by a large red torii gate. The character walks around a central ornamental tree while other visitors are scattered throughout the area. Traditional temple buildings line the left side while a modern tower rises in the background.

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the courtyard toward the main temple building, ascending a wide stone staircase. The temple entrance facade looms ahead with bronze guardian lion statues flanking the steps. As the character climbs, they move from bright sunlight into the shadow cast by the building.

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the character approaches the temple entrance where two heavily armed guards in distinctive red and green armor stand watch with futuristic rifles. The entrance features traditional hanging lanterns and blue neon floor lights leading into the dark interior. The character moves past the guards toward the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a glowing energy sphere through a traditional temple complex that blends ancient architecture with futuristic elements. It begins by passing a blue energy sphere before entering a covered walkway lined with stone columns and a red carpet runner. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the scene opens into a sunlit courtyard featuring a large red torii gate and an ornamental tree, with a modern tower looming in the distance. The movement then shifts toward the main temple building, ascending a wide stone staircase flanked by bronze lion statues as the lighting transitions from bright sunlight into deep shadow. Finally, the camera approaches the temple entrance, passing two armed guards in red and green armor toward a doorway illuminated by traditional lanterns and blue neon floor lights.
